candidate_check.description: Microsoft Defender AV must enable real-time protection.

check_content_excerpt: Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Real-time Protection >> Turn off real-time protection is set to "Disabled"; otherwise, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Real-time Protection >> Turn off real-time protection to "Disabled".

Click "OK".

Click "Apply".
title: Microsoft Defender AV must enable real-time protection.
